name: Seapeak LLC 8.50% Series B Fixed-to-Floating Rate Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Units
summary: Seapeak LLC 8.50% Series B Fixed-to-Floating Rate Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Units represents preferred equity in Seapeak LLC. These units offer a dividend rate that transitions from a fixed rate to a floating rate after a certain period, and have priority over common shares in terms of dividend payments and asset distribution. Seapeak LLC is involved in the maritime industry.
